scripts.size-check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const zlib=require('zlib');const buf=fs.readFileSync('dist/p.js');zlib.gzip(buf,(e,r)=>{if(e)throw e;const kb=(r.length/1024).toFixed(2);console.log('Snippet gzipped size:',kb,'KB (',r.length,'bytes)');if(r.length>12288){console.error('FAIL: snippet exceeds gzip budget (12KB cap, 12288B)');process.exit(1);}console.log('PASS');});"
